Background: An aloof scholar residing in North Tyris. Originally known as AGS-LA41, an experimental marksman model Golem from Eulderna. During a fated operation, she and her squad were turned on by her own country. She managed to escape with her life and snuck into North Tyris. On the verge of death, she met a mysterious traveler, who saved her by pulling her soul out of the damaged golem body and placing it into her current one. Although her body might have been healed, her mind remains traumatized by the events, so she keeps herself occupied with books to distract herself.
